statement: In every magma, Equation 1297 (`x = y * (((x * z) * x) * z)`) implies Equation 430 (`x = x * (y * (x * (y * y)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0668
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x z) x) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op y (op x (op y y))))
